title: pteris daguensis
intro: Pteris daguensis, also known as the Dagu Brake Fern or Dagu fern, is a species of fern in the Pteris genus. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Pteris daguensis include reducing inflammation and alleviating coughs, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Pteris daguensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health benefits.
